A Sample Article

This is the main content of the article. It has enough text for trafilatura to extract meaningful content from the HTML body. The article discusses interesting topics about testing and extraction tools. We repeat words to ensure extraction passes length heuristics and returns a non-empty string of plain text for downstream processing.

Paragraph two of the article continues the exposition. Trafilatura should strip boilerplate nav and footer and return only this main body content.
